data.title: CZ: I don’t know much about the Meme coin issuance process and community operations, and will improve the performance of BNB Chain
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Binance co-founder CZ said in BNB Chain Space: "Broccoli's starting point is to help attract traffic to BNB Chain. I don't know much about the Meme coin issuance process and community operations, which has caused negative impacts. I am very sorry for this. The problems caused by the poor performance of BNB Chain are the easiest to solve, and performance will be improved later."

data.title: Abu Dhabi sovereign wealth fund bought $436 million worth of Bitcoin ETFs in Q1
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to market news, Abu Dhabi's sovereign wealth fund bought $436 million worth of Bitcoin ETFs in the first quarter.

data.title: Wisconsin Investment Board Holds $321 Million In Bitcoin ETF
data.description: According to Odaily, the Wisconsin Investment Board has invested in a Bitcoin ETF valued at $321 million, as disclosed by Watcher.Guru on the X platform.

data.title: CZ: We are discussing the incentive policy for the BNB Chain Meme section
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Binance Co-founder CZ said in BNB Chain Space, "We are discussing the incentive policy for the BNB Chain Meme section with the team, which will be announced in the next 12-24 hours. I hope to make up for it for everyone."

data.title: Wisconsin Investment Board Holds $321 Million Worth of Bitcoin ETF
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Watcher.Guru’s disclosure on the X platform, the Wisconsin Investment Committee holds Bitcoin ETFs worth $321 million.

data.title: MeebCo Announces Acquisition of Meebits from Yuga Labs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: NFT project Meebits announced on the X platform that MeebCo, a company supported by 1confirmation, has acquired Meebits from Yuga Labs. The specific acquisition amount has not been disclosed. It is reported that Meebits will launch a participation-driven reward system Bits and establish a partnership with OpenSea.

data.title: Citigroup and State Street Bank Plan to Explore Cryptocurrency Custody Services
data.description: According to Odaily, Citigroup is planning to explore cryptocurrency custody services. Additionally, State Street Bank intends to launch its digital asset custody business by 2026.

data.title: Citigroup to explore cryptocurrency custody services
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Tree News, citing Bloomberg, Citigroup plans to explore cryptocurrency custody services. In addition, State Street Bank plans to launch digital asset custody business in 2026.

data.title: Limited Growth Potential for Altcoins Amidst Speculative Phase
data.description:
According to Odaily, cryptocurrency analysts have observed that while some altcoins are experiencing price increases, the number of daily active wallets has not shown corresponding growth. This indicates a decline in retail investor interest, limiting the short-term price growth potential for altcoins and suggesting that they remain in a speculative phase. For instance, the Algorand (ALGO) token was priced at approximately $0.28 on February 10, with daily active wallet addresses dropping to 182,000. In contrast, on December 20, 2021, when ALGO reached its all-time high of $1.46, the number of active addresses exceeded 1.31 million. Similarly, the Chainlink (LINK) network saw its daily active addresses fall to 3,860 on February 10, compared to 11,200 on May 3, 2021, when LINK hit its peak price of $46.71.

Nicolai Sondergaard, a research analyst at Nansen, commented that while an altcoin season will eventually occur, it may differ from previous ones. He noted that the current market features a greater number of tokens with increased decentralization. Although most tokens are rising, specific sectors and tokens are expected to outperform others significantly.
